case_title: WEST LYNETTE MARIE VS CARLILE NANCY ALLEN AKA BREEZE CARLILE

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,265.00 FILED BY WEST LYNETTE MARIE AS TO DEFENDANT CARLILE NANCY ALLEN AKA BREEZE CARLILE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-07-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 05
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CARLILE NANCY ALLEN AKA BREEZE CARLILE
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY CARLILE NANCY ALLEN AKA BREEZE CARLILE AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT WEST LYNETTE MARIE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-07-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 05

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WEST LYNETTE MARIE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CARLILE NANCY ALLEN AKA BREEZE CARLILE $1,265.00 PRINCIPAL, $33.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,298.00, DEFT AGREED IN WRITING TO REPAY THE LOAN STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON DEFENDANT'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT CARLILE NANCY ALLEN AKA BREEZE CARLILE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT WEST LYNETTE MARIE DEFT FAILED TO ESTABLISH BREACH OF AGRMT, OR THE TERMS OF THE ALLEGED EMPLOYMENT CONTRACT STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT CARLILE NANCY ALLEN AKA BREEZE CARLILE
